name: Alan Gabriel Ascorti
headline: Software Architect · Domain-driven backends · Multitenant SaaS on Azure | Go
summary: Software architect specialized in translating complex business domains into scalable, maintainable multitenant systems.
Current Lead Developer at Contarg: 100+ Go microservices and internal M2M SDKs on Azure Container Apps + PostgreSQL Cluster, with Next.js frontends on Vercel.
A decade of operational and accounting management before software engineering informs how I model domains, business rules, and operational UX.
